action.reasoning: Observation: First baseline training (200k timesteps) yielded 0.0 success_rate across all envs, with mean reward 0.0. The training progressed (explained_variance improved to 0.643), but policy failed any success. Analysis: PPO on Minigrid with sparse rewards needs substantially more environment interactions to learn meaningful behaviors. Multi-task across 10 diverse environments is challenging. Decision: Increase training timesteps to 5M (≈60-70 minutes). Keep same architecture but increase network width (256-dim hidden layers) for more capacity. Submit eval after training to measure improvement.
